# demo-mcp AI Tool Infrastructure

> Deterministic utility APIs and MCP tools for agents. v0.1: Base64 encode/decode (UTF-8 text only).

## API

- [OpenAPI 3.1 JSON](https://api.demo-mcp.dev/openapi.json): REST contract for all tools
- [OpenAPI YAML](https://api.demo-mcp.dev/openapi.yaml): Human-readable specification
- [Tool catalog](https://api.demo-mcp.dev/v1/tools): Machine-readable tool index with MCP name mapping
- [API catalog](https://api.demo-mcp.dev/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727-style discovery for agents

## MCP

- [server.json](https://github.com/nni-hotel/demo-mcp/blob/main/server.json): MCP Registry metadata (io.github.nni-hotel/demo-mcp)
- [MCP setup](https://github.com/nni-hotel/demo-mcp/blob/main/docs/mcp-setup.md): stdio and streamable-http configuration

## Tools

- [Base64 tool](https://github.com/nni-hotel/demo-mcp/blob/main/docs/tools/base64.md): When to use, examples, error codes

## Errors

- [Error codes](https://github.com/nni-hotel/demo-mcp/blob/main/docs/errors.md): Machine-readable error dictionary for agents

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://api.demo-mcp.dev/llms-full.txt): Bundled documentation for RAG and inference
